nasb.text: Thus says the Lord, “Cursed is the man who trusts in mankind And makes flesh his strength, And whose heart turns away from the Lord.

esv.text: Thus says the Lord: “Cursed is the man who trusts in man and makes flesh his strength, whose heart turns away from the Lord.

cnv.text: 耶和華這樣說： “倚靠世人， 恃憑肉體為自己的力量， 心裡偏離耶和華的， 這人該受咒詛。

ccb.text: 耶和华说： “信靠世人、倚靠血肉之躯、 背叛耶和华的人该受咒诅！
